message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "clause_text": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement.",
      "clause_name": "Termination for Non-Delivery",
      "clause_type": "termination",
      "summary": "Allows Company to cancel the Phase Agreement if Developer fails to deliver completed programs within a specified timeframe.",
      "risk_level": "high",
      "impact": "Potential loss of investment and project delays for Company.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Define clear delivery timelines and penalties for delays.",
        "Ensure that the cancellation process is well-documented."
      ],
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Failure by Developer to deliver the completed programming by the end of the ………… [insert number] days after the delivery date specified in the Phase Agreement will entitle Company to a ……. [insert number] % reduction in the cost of the entire Phase for each ……. [insert number] day period in which Developer is late.",
      "clause_name": "Penalty for Late Delivery",
      "clause_type": "liability",
      "summary": "Imposes financial penalties on Developer for late delivery of programming.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Encourages timely delivery but may lead to disputes over penalties.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Clearly define the penalty percentages and grace periods.",
        "Establish a dispute resolution mechanism for penalty disputes."
      ],
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Upon passing the acceptance test, Company shall pay to Developer an additional ……. [insert number] % of the price of the phase.",
      "clause_name": "Payment Upon Acceptance",
      "clause_type": "payment",
      "summary": "Specifies payment terms contingent upon successful acceptance testing of the software.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Aligns Developer's incentives with successful delivery but may delay final payment.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Ensure acceptance criteria are clearly defined.",
        "Document the acceptance testing process thoroughly."
      ],
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "If the programs fail to perform the acceptance tests, the parties shall follow this procedure: a) Company shall immediately notify Developer by telephone of the failure of the test.",
      "clause_name": "Acceptance Test Failure Procedure",
      "clause_type": "dispute resolution",
      "summary": "Outlines the procedure to follow if the software fails acceptance testing.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Provides a clear process for addressing failures but may lead to delays.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Clarify timelines for notification and remediation.",
        "Consider including escalation procedures for unresolved issues."
      ],
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Upon receipt of said programming specifications, Company will either approve or disapprove of said specifications. Such approval will be at the sole discretion of Company.",
      "clause_name": "Approval of Specifications",
      "clause_type": "ownership",
      "summary": "Grants Company the sole discretion to approve or disapprove programming specifications.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Empowers Company but may lead to delays if specifications are not approved promptly.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Set timelines for approval to avoid project delays.",
        "Encourage collaborative specification development."
      ],
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "The Phase Agreement shall contain the following: a) The fixed price for the Phase.",
      "clause_name": "Fixed Price Agreement",
      "clause_type": "payment",
      "summary": "Establishes a fixed price for the services outlined in the Phase Agreement.",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "impact": "Provides cost certainty for Company but may limit Developer's flexibility.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Ensure that the fixed price reflects all potential costs.",
        "Consider including provisions for scope changes."
      ],
      "confidence": 0.85
    }
  ]
}
